```{=html}
<div class="practice-timer" data-minutes="10"></div>

<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:6px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 16px 16px 0;padding:1.25em 2.1em 1.35em;">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.82em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.55em;">— practice 03 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:800;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:0.75em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;white-space:nowrap;">
   Turn your site into a skill.
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.45em;">

   <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.7em 1fr;gap:0.8em;align-items:center;background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:11px;padding:0.48em 0.9em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.42em;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.14);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.35);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#FFB84D;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="folder-git-2" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.12em;">STEP 01</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.4;">Create a new repo, open it using your IDE, then launch <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.92em;color:#FFB84D;">claude</code> inside it.</div>
    </div>
   </div>

   <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.7em 1fr;gap:0.8em;align-items:center;background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:11px;padding:0.48em 0.9em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.42em;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.14);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.35);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#FFB84D;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="sparkles" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.12em;">STEP 02</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.4;">Give Claude your site's path and let it write your <strong>skill</strong> and the <strong>symlink</strong> shell command.</div>
    </div>
   </div>

   <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.7em 1fr;gap:0.8em;align-items:center;background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:11px;padding:0.48em 0.9em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.42em;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.14);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.35);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#FFB84D;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="link" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.12em;">STEP 03</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.4;">Ask Claude to run that command to <strong>create the symlink</strong>.</div>
    </div>
   </div>

  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
